summary: 5 film announcements, 8 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Phoebe Berman's Gonna Lose It
film.announcement: Movie in development at Netflix from 'The Nightingale' producer and 'Book Lovers' screenwriter.

film.title: FlySquad – First Strike!
film.announcement: Animated feature in development with Cher and Bob Geldof in talks to join the cast.

film.title: Austin Powers 4
film.announcement: Mike Myers confirms that a fourth Austin Powers film is in development.

film.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight Sequel
film.announcement: Geena Davis expresses interest in making a sequel to 'The Long Kiss Goodnight' with Samuel L. Jackson.

film.title: Steps
film.talent: Nikki Glaser, Ali Wong, Amanda Seyfried
film.announcement: Nikki Glaser joins Netflix animated fairy tale project with Ali Wong and Amanda Seyfried.

tv.title: Rock City
tv.announcement: Comedy series in development at Hulu from 'Abbott Elementary' star Janelle James and 'Happy Endings' creator David Caspe.

tv.title: Untitled Alex Cary Thriller
tv.announcement: Grace Gummer joins Dakota Fanning in Apple's thriller series from creator Alex Cary.

tv.title: Exit Right
tv.talent: Susan Sarandon, Kim Coates, Roberta Colindrez, Amy Sedaris, Ethan Slater, Christopher Jackson
tv.announcement: Drama series wraps production with ensemble cast including Susan Sarandon, Amy Sedaris, and Ethan Slater.

tv.title: Survival of the Thickest
tv.announcement: Third and final season trailer unveiled with release date announced.

tv.title: The Westies
tv.announcement: Crime drama drops trailer with co-creator Chris Brancato teasing season 1 details.

tv.title: One Night in Idaho: The College Murders
tv.announcement: True crime series renewed for season 2 on Amazon with new testimony.

tv.title: ComicView Rooftop Series
tv.announcement: BET revives 'ComicView' with new 'Rooftop Series' hosted by Chris 'CP' Powell.

tv.title: Bridge & Tunnel
tv.announcement: Comedian Des Bishop's new special 'Bridge & Tunnel' sets release date on Hulu.
